MitigationStrategy: Multi-layered endpoint protection with EDR and weekly backup verification

RiskDescription: Phishing attack leading to credential theft
MitigationStrategy: Mandatory quarterly phishing simulations and MFA on all accounts
Role-based access control with quarterly access reviews and DLP policies

RiskDescription: Failure to meet GDPR data subject access requests within 30 days
MitigationStrategy: Automated DSAR workflow with SLA tracking in DWx Policy Manager

RiskDescription: Key person dependency in infrastructure team
MitigationStrategy: Cross-training programme and documented runbooks for all critical processes

RiskDescription: Budget overrun on digital transformation programme
MitigationStrategy: Monthly budget reviews with 10% contingency reserve and stage-gate approvals

RiskDescription: Data breach resulting in negative media coverage
MitigationStrategy: Incident response plan with pre-approved media statements and PR agency on retainer
Multi-vendor strategy for critical services with contractual SLA penalties
Legal counsel review of policy updates quarterly with HR compliance tracking

RiskDescription: Office flood or natural disaster impacting operations
MitigationStrategy: Business continuity plan with remote work capability and off-site backup data centre

RiskDescription: Supply chain compromise via third-party software
MitigationStrategy: Vendor security assessments and software composition analysis for all dependencies
Retention programme with quarterly stay interviews and market-rate salary benchmarking
Data transfer impact assessments and Standard Contractual Clauses for all transfers

RiskDescription: Legacy system failure causing service disruption
MitigationStrategy: Phased migration plan with parallel running and automated failover
